You can access Apple Keynote presentations from Windows computers through iCloud True

You need to store a list of webpages so you can easily return to them later.
What web browser feature or setting should you use?
Address box

options.text: Favorites or Bookmarks ✓
History or Timeline Tabbed Browsing

questionText:

save? (Choose 3.)
Purpose of the information

options.text: Page content sources
Page title ✓
Comments that support the veracity of the page content
URL

questionText:
What is a computer virus?
Content that tricks you into revealing account codes and passwords by pretending to be legitimate
A program that is designed to look harmless but allows unauthorized access to your computer
A program that installs itself on your system without your knowledge and tracks your computer usage

options.text: A program that can copy itself and spread to other computers ✓

questionText: Which two technologies do websites use to track visitors' online browsing habits? (Choose 2)

options.text: GPS locations ✓
First-party cookies ✓
VPN tunneling In private/incognito browsing  -- 22 of 26 --

questionText:
For each statement about Creative Commons, select True or False.
Answer Area
Allows creators to grant licenses to only specific people True
Correct answer: False
Helps facilitate the sharing and discovery of creative works on the web True
Provides tools that allow creators to dedicate their works to the public domain False
Correct answer: True

Which three elements must you include in a citation that references a printed book? 	(Choose 3.) Note: You will receive
credit for each correct answer.
Access date

options.text: Author name ✓
Publication date ✓
Book title ✓
Copyright status Trademark status

questionText: What is spyware?

options.text: A program that installs itself on your system without your knowledge and tracks your online habits ✓

A program that can copy itself and spread to other computers A program that is designed to look harmless but allows unauthorized access to your computer Content that tricks you into revealing account codes and passwords by pretending to be legitimate

questionText:
What distinguishes generative AI from chatbots?
Generative AI and chatbots are terms used interchangeably to refer to the same technology
Chatbots are designed for creating new content, while generative AI specializes in text-based interactions.
Both generative AI and chatbots excel at simulating conversations, but generative AI is restricted to pre-defined responses.

options.text: Generative AI focuses on generating creative content, while chatbots simulate human-like conversations. ✓

questionText:
You are working on a research project. You locate a long online article that contains information related to your
research topic. Which information can you locate on the webpage by using the browser's Find feature?

options.text: The number of times the article mentions a specific topic ✓
The answer to a specific Question related to the article topic Related comments on social media sites A list of secondary topics related to your primary research topic  -- 23 of 26 --

Maddie uses social media to stay in touch with friends and family. She is planning to go on vacation next month.
What is the safest way for Maddie to protect herself from online predators when posting information about her vacation
activities?
Checking in online when she goes places so her parents know where she is
Setting her social media location map to "public"

options.text: Waiting until she returns home to post vacation photos ✓
Posting her vacation plans before she leaves so her friends know she is out of town  -- 24 of 26 --

questionText:

the task, or No if you cannot. Note: You will receive credit for each correct answer.
Change the format of all citations in your document No
Identify pages that include references by a specific author No

Online messaging apps simplify the process of communicating with other people. For each statement, select True
or False. Note: You will receive credit for each correct answer.
Answer Area
Emojis are a constantly changing concept that may not universally reflect sources of study True
Communication through emojis reproduces social constructs such as stereotypes, prejudices, and limitations True
People who use smart-messaging share the same beliefs and practices whether they are next door or in
another country
False

Move each data storage device from the list on the left to the correct definition on the right.
Note: You will receive credit for each correct answer.
An internal data storage device that stores and retrieves data using flash memory Solid-state drive
A compact, lightweight external data storage device that uses flash memory USB flash drive
An external data storage device powered through the USB port of the computer Portable hard drive
An internal electromechanical data storage device that stores and retrieves data using a rapidly
rotating platter
Hard disk drive

questionText:

Heightened feelings of happiness

questionText:
You need to ensure the security of your passwords. Which three guidelines should you follow? (Choose 3.)
Use words that can be found in the dictionary of a language other than your primary language.

options.text: Use a different password for each account. ✓
Use the longest password or passphrase permissible by each password system. ✓
Use multi-factor authentication when available. ✓
Use complex passwords and record them in a notebook that you keep with you at all times. Use passwords that are based on private personal information.

questionText:
